title: Amtech A0120 8oz (225g) Claw Hammer with Steel Shaft
features: STURDY: This 8oz (225g) claw hammer has a drop forged, hardened and tempered head and a strong, tubular steel shaft
COMFORTABLE: The hammer is fitted with a non-slip rubber grip
PRACTICAL SIZE: 8oz weight offers balance and control.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople alike.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Hammer See more
